channel.title: Design on user859
channel.description: Recent content in Design on user859

item.title: Design Projects
item.description:
Here i’ll post my design projects i made at my spare time if i could.

I’ll probably update this if i made a new design project and i feel to post it here.

A Tetris mockup i made in Illustrator, took a while to make, especially the clipping masks for the background.

(its marathon in multiplayer, i know it’s weird but i just want to “keep it that way”.)
